item.title: Nava Ltd Q4 FY26: Profit Plunges 46% Despite Revenue Growth as Tax Burden Soars
item.description: Nava Limited, the Hyderabad-based power and ferro alloys manufacturer, reported a concerning 45.77% year-on-year decline in consolidated net profit to ₹127.13 crores for Q4 FY26, despite posting healthy revenue growth of 12.24%. The sharp profit contraction was primarily driven by an extraordinary tax rate of 58.03%, which jumped from just 6.52% in the same quarter last year. The stock reacted sharply to the disappointing results, plunging 10.66% to ₹628.40 on May 15, 2026, erasing significant value from its ₹19,867 crore market capitalisation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Welspun Living Q4 FY26: Margin Recovery Drives Profit Surge Despite Revenue Headwinds
item.description: Welspun Living Ltd., one of the world's largest home textile manufacturers, reported a dramatic profit recovery in Q4 FY26, with consolidated net profit surging to ₹103.70 crores from a mere ₹0.21 crores in the previous quarter—a staggering sequential growth of 49,280.95%. However, this impressive bottom-line performance masks persistent top-line challenges, as net sales declined 7.95% year-on-year to ₹2,435.43 crores. The stock responded positively, rallying 5.03% on the day following the results announcement, closing at ₹140.90 and pushing the company's market capitalisation to ₹13,001 crores. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Aro Granite Industries Q4 FY26: Mounting Losses Signal Deep Operational Distress
item.description: Aro Granite Industries Ltd., a micro-cap granite manufacturer and exporter, reported a deeply concerning Q4 FY26 performance, with net losses widening dramatically to ₹6.41 crores compared to a marginal profit of ₹0.02 crores in Q4 FY25—marking a staggering deterioration of over 32,000%. The company's shares, trading at ₹26.01 with a market capitalisation of ₹41.00 crores, have plummeted 31.55% over the past year and remain trapped in a mildly bearish technical trend, reflecting investor capitulation amid mounting operational challenges. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Pricol Ltd Joins Reliable Performers List Following Robust Q4 Financials
item.description: Pricol Ltd, a small-cap player in the auto components and equipment sector, has been added to the esteemed Reliable Performers list as of 15 May 2026, reflecting its impressive financial turnaround and sustained growth momentum. The company’s latest quarterly results underscore a significant acceleration in profitability and sales, positioning it favourably for investors seeking consistent fundamental strength combined with promising price trends. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Mukand Joins Hidden Turnarounds List Following Strong Q4 Performance
item.description: Mukand, a small-cap player in the ferrous metals sector, has been added to the prestigious Hidden Turnarounds list as of 15 May 2026, following a remarkable quarterly performance that signals a potential fundamental shift in its business trajectory. This inclusion reflects the company’s improved profitability and operational resilience, positioning it as a compelling candidate for investors seeking early-stage turnaround opportunities. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Solara Active Pharma Q4 FY26: Profitability Returns Amid Margin Pressures
item.description: Solara Active Pharma Sciences Ltd., a small-cap pharmaceutical manufacturer specialising in active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), returned to quarterly profitability in Q4 FY26 with a net profit of ₹9.60 crores, reversing losses of ₹17.43 crores in the preceding quarter. However, the company's shares surged 14.32% to ₹579.45 following the results announcement, reflecting investor optimism despite persistent margin pressures and structural challenges that continue to constrain long-term value creation. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Rane Holdings Q4 FY26: Strong Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Rane Holdings Limited, the Chennai-based automotive component holding company, reported a robust consolidated net profit of ₹74.16 crores for Q4 FY26 (Mar'26 quarter), marking a dramatic turnaround from a loss of ₹50.56 crores in the previous quarter. Despite the impressive quarterly performance, the stock's valuation premium of 80x trailing earnings and a 'Strong Sell' rating from proprietary scoring models suggest investors should exercise caution at current levels of ₹1,438.35 per share, representing a market capitalisation of ₹1,800 crores. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Alacrity Securities Q4 FY26: Sharp Loss Reversal Raises Red Flags Despite Revenue Growth
item.description: Alacrity Securities Ltd., a micro-cap non-banking financial company with a market capitalisation of ₹330.00 crores, reported deeply concerning fourth-quarter results for FY26, swinging to a net loss of ₹5.55 crores from a profit of ₹5.14 crores in the corresponding quarter last year. Despite revenue growth of 48.26% year-on-year to ₹124.97 crores, the company's profitability collapsed entirely, with operating margins turning sharply negative at -5.30% compared to -8.08% in Q4 FY25. The stock declined 4.23% following the results announcement, closing at ₹69.47 on May 15, 2026, reflecting investor concerns about the deteriorating financial health of this NBFC. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Thangamayil Jewellery Q4 FY26: Stellar Performance Drives 354% Profit Surge
item.description: Thangamayil Jewellery Ltd., one of Tamil Nadu's leading jewellery retailers, delivered an exceptional performance in Q4 FY26, reporting a net profit of ₹142.66 crores, marking a remarkable 354.28% year-on-year surge and a 36.15% sequential improvement. The Madurai-based jeweller's revenue soared 105.59% YoY to ₹2,838.21 crores, reflecting robust demand and aggressive store expansion. Following the results, the stock traded at ₹3,594.40 with a market capitalisation of ₹11,191 crores, though recent sessions have witnessed some profit-booking after a spectacular multi-year rally. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Stanpacks (India) Q4 FY26: Margin Squeeze Deepens as Losses Mount
item.description: Stanpacks (India) Ltd., a Chennai-based packaging manufacturer, reported a concerning fourth quarter for FY26, with the company slipping into losses as operating margins collapsed to their lowest levels in recent years. The micro-cap company posted a net loss of ₹0.13 crores in Q4 FY26, a sharp reversal from the ₹0.03 crores profit recorded in the previous quarter, marking a deterioration of 316.67% quarter-on-quarter. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Standard Enginnering Technology Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Standard Engineering Technology Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with record net sales of ₹226.68 crores, but profitability is a concern due to a decline in operating margins to 13.91%. While net profit increased, rising costs, particularly in employee expenses, may impact future performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Mangal Electrical Industries Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales up 14.81% sequentially, but profitability has declined, with net profit down 4.78% from the previous quarter and operating margins significantly compressed. While revenue momentum is positive, the company faces challenges in cost management that could impact future growth. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth in net profit and sales, but a decline in quarterly profit and a significant drop in operating margins raise concerns about operational challenges. Investors should watch for signs of margin recovery in upcoming quarters. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Shadowfax Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Shadowfax Technologies Ltd's latest results are positive, showing significant growth in net sales and a return to profitability, with a net profit increase of over 764% year-on-year. However, concerns about capital efficiency and high valuation multiples suggest caution moving forward. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: P N Gadgil Jewellers Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with record net sales of ₹3,544.31 crores, but profitability is concerning due to a 47.19% decline in net profit and significant margin compression, indicating operational challenges that investors should monitor closely. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are RBZ Jewellers Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: RBZ Jewellers Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth in sales and profit, but significant quarter-on-quarter declines raise concerns about operational challenges and market confidence. Investors should be cautious due to ongoing issues like negative cash flow and reduced institutional holdings. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Borana Weaves Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Borana Weaves Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth in sales and profit, with net sales up 27.99% and net profit up 57.98%. However, there were sequential declines, raising concerns about the sustainability of this growth amid typical seasonal fluctuations in the textile sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Senores Pharmaceuticals Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Senores Pharmaceuticals Ltd reported strong Q4 FY26 results with a 77.29% increase in net profit and a 53.39% rise in net sales year-on-year. However, the company faces challenges with declining operating margins and rising interest costs, raising concerns about profitability sustainability amid its expansion efforts. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Vishal Mega Mart Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd's latest results show a seasonal decline in quarterly net sales and a significant drop in net profit, indicating margin pressures, but year-on-year growth remains strong, reflecting overall robust annual performance. The company’s strong balance sheet and cash flow position it well for future growth despite current challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
